source: Browser SERP check (Chrome, signed-in profile) + GSC (local pre-fetch)
run_notes: OFF-CYCLE run: fired Thursday 2026-07-16, 3 days after the 2026-07-13 Monday run (not a full 7-day gap). WoW deltas are 3-day deltas. GEO CAVEAT: national SERPs returned Austin-area domains (austinheart, austinregionalclinic, austincounselingnutrition, austinmedicineclinic), confirming the browser profile geo-localises to Austin, not San Antonio -- SA-local positions are likely understated and week-to-week variance is partly personalisation noise.

summary.note: total_clicks/total_impressions are QUERY-dimension sums and undercount because GSC drops anonymised queries. page_level_* are the true site totals.

esperanza_competitive_status.esperanza_content_activity: DORMANT. WP REST: 55 pages, 0 published and 0 modified since 2026-07-09. Most recent modification site-wide = 2026-06-17 (patient-resources). No new content to defend against.
esperanza_competitive_status.bigger_local_threat: balancedcounselingsa.com now outranks BCC on every SA eating-disorder term checked (#1 on eating disorder counseling SA, eating disorder therapist SA, emotional eating therapy SA; #3 on food addiction + binge eating treatment SA) and appears in 6/29 SERPs -- same count as Esperanza but at better positions.
